description_long: This object depicts three children standing side by side, each with a youthful build and casual urban attire. The children wear short-sleeve shirts, jeans, and vests, with one child in the center dressed in darker clothing. Their footwear consists of sneakers, and their hair is short and neatly styled. The children are depicted in a relaxed, upright posture, with arms hanging naturally by their sides. The overall appearance suggests they are ready for everyday activities in a city or neighborhood environment.
description: Three children stand side by side in casual clothing, each wearing jeans, short-sleeve shirts, vests, and sneakers, with short, neatly styled hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing three children standing side by side, clearly displaying their shirts, vests, jeans, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the children's profiles, showing the thickness of their clothing and the fit of their jeans and vests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the children, including the back of their vests, jeans, and the shape of their haircuts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the children, again emphasizing the side details of their outfits and posture.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve shirt, jeans, and sleeveless vest
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a natural part
